stemHtml: What is EASA's role and objective?

options.a: EASA proposes implementing rules to the European Commission and promotes the highest common standards of safety and environmental protection in civil aviation.
options.b: EASA proposes guidelines to the aviation industry and promotes the highest safety and environmental standards.
options.c: EASA makes non-binding rule proposals to National Aviation Authorities.
options.d: EASA proposes rules directly to National Aviation Authorities and promotes the highest safety standards.
